/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ArchTrackTransmutator.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArchTrackTransmutator.dir/src/audioio/FfmpegInspector.cpp.o -o ArchTrackTransmutator  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/aubio/0.4.9_4/lib/libaubio.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/rtaudio/6.0.1/lib/librtaudio.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1_1/lib/libavformat.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1_1/lib/libavcodec.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1_1/lib/libavutil.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1_1/lib/libswresample.dylib
